TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Maladacay_to‚Äôedip, title = Maladacay_to‚Äôedip, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maladacay_to‚Äôedip} }

S.FORM: Maladacay to'edip , 50 kongli ko raraay to sera, laeno 10 kongli, nonini a to'edip awaay ko lalitemoh, kasopedan no adihayay no cuoyang, o cuoyangcen han. Pinengnengan Papotalay a lahod to'edip Mirakarakay lahod to'edip Sasifoay to'edip Kasacoelisan to'edip Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: ma…ĺa…¨~…ģa ¶aj to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip , ** ko~uŇč…ĺi ko~u raraaj to~u s…ôra, …ĺa…ôno~u ** ko~uŇč…ĺi, no~unini a to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip awaaj ko~u …ĺa…ĺit…ômo~uńß, kaso~up…ô…¨~…ģan no~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj no~u ¶o~u~uo~ujaŇč, o~u ¶o~u~uo~ujaŇč ¶…ôn ńßan. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan papo~uta…ĺaj a …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip mirakarakaj …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip sasifo~uaj to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip kasa ¶o~u…ô…ĺisan to~u °…ô…¨~…ģip tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: Maladacay to'edip , 50 kongli ko raraay to sera, laeno 10 kongli, nonini a to'edip awaay ko lalitemoh, kasopedan no adihayay no cuoyang, o cuoyangcen han. Pinengnengan Papotalay a lahod to'edip Mirakarakay lahod to'edip Sasifoay to'edip Kasacoelisan to'edip Tatiri'an a tilid
